message.content:
@startuml
title Activity Diagram
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam titleFontColor #000000
skinparam titleFontSize 24
skinparam titleFontStyle bold
skinparam rectangle {
  BackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  BorderColor #000000
  FontSize 18
  FontColor #000000
}
skinparam linetype ortho
skinparam arrowColor #000000
skinparam arrowThickness 1

rectangle "Bot Service" as BS1
rectangle "Listener" as L1
rectangle "Worker" as W1
rectangle "Publisher" as P1

rectangle "Bot Service" as BS2
rectangle "Listener" as L2
rectangle "Worker" as W2
rectangle "Publisher" as P2

BS1 -[hidden]-> L1
L1 -[hidden]-> W1
W1 -[hidden]-> P1

BS2 -[hidden]-> L2
L2 -[hidden]-> W2
W2 -[hidden]-> P2

BS1 ..> BS2
L1 ..> L2
W1 ..> W2
P1 ..> P2

@enduml
